content.en:
Then.

One of the Origin Ascenders asked, "Lord Desolate Blood Ancestor, where is the treasure land for this exploration?"

The Desolate Blood Ancestor smiled and said, "It's the ruins of reincarnation!"

"Sure enough, it's in the ruins of reincarnation!"

Some Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors had already guessed.

Nowadays, almost all the treasure lands in the central part are occupied, where are there any new treasure lands, even if there are newly born treasure lands, there are no good things, or there is no need to find them.

Then, it can only be the ruins of reincarnation.

The ruins of reincarnation are very special areas, and the end of the land on the other side of eternity is the ruins of reincarnation, but the ordinary Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor can't go to the ruins of reincarnation, and only the overlord of the Origin Upper Realm has the strength to break the boundaries and enter the ruins of reincarnation.

In other words, only the nine top overlord forces in the central part are qualified to develop the ruins of reincarnation.

However, it is also very difficult to find the treasure land in the ruins of reincarnation, and you have to pay a lot of money, and even lose a lot of manpower.

And even if you find the ruins of reincarnation, the danger is very great.

"Desolate Blood Ancestor, can you tell us a little bit about this treasure land?" asked one of the Origin Ascendants.

The Desolate Blood Ancestor said lightly: "There is not much information, I can only tell you that I can't enter that treasure land, so I need you to explore that treasure land." At present, our Ancient Heavenly Palace knows very little about that treasure land, only that once we enter, we will first encounter a creature called the Reincarnation Blood Eater, which is comparable to the Origin Upper Realm. The number of our Desolate Ancient Heavenly Palace's Origin Upper Realm is limited, and it can't withstand the toss, so we need you to explore. "

"If you are willing to go, put on the Ancient Bead of the Ancient Heavenly Palace. The Ancient Bead will record your information all the time, and when you find the treasure, hand it over immediately, and then you can leave!"

As soon as they heard that they were being monitored, many Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors were a little unhappy.

"Desolate Blood Ancestor, when the time comes, you can investigate carefully, you can't monitor all the time, right?" said a Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor helplessly.

The Desolate Blood Ancestor said in a deep voice: "This must be done, otherwise if the Origin Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor refines the resources in the treasure land, then won't we lose money? Besides, if we don't monitor, we won't be able to know the situation of that treasure land, so what's the point of inviting you here?"

With that, the other Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors didn't know what to say.

"If you don't want to, then leave immediately!"

The Desolate Blood Ancestor's tone was not easy to refute.

A few Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors left, and they weren't afraid of being watched, but they just didn't want to take risks.

Everyone knows that this time is very dangerous, and there is a great possibility of falling.

So, they chose to give up.

And the Origin Upper Realm, who did not give up, received the Desolate Ancient Beads one by one, which were all secret treasures refined by the Desolate Blood Ancestor.

Subsequently.

They put the treasure on their bodies.

It didn't take long.

All the Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors followed the Desolate Blood Ancestor of the Desolate Ancient Heavenly Palace and the other Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors to the Desolate Ancient Heavenly Gate of the Desolate Ancient Heavenly Palace.

The Ancient Heavenly Gate is similar to a teleportation channel, through which one can enter the ruins of reincarnation.

Otherwise, they won't be able to get in!

Airplanes!!!

A Heavenly Ancestor of the Origin Upper Realm passed through the Ancient Heavenly Gate and came to the ruins of reincarnation.

In an instant, an unimaginable pressure hit.

"This is the ruins of reincarnation!"

Ye Tian's Origin Realm Will probed around, but he felt distorted, even the Origin Realm Will couldn't extend far, otherwise it would be distorted to pieces by a special force.

"Enter the Reincarnation Treasure Ship, so that you can reach that treasure land faster!"

The Desolate Blood Ancestor said.

Whoa!!!

A Origin Origin Ascended to the Realm and entered the reincarnation treasure ship.

After all the Origin Ascending Realms had gone up, the Reincarnation Treasure Ship went to that treasure land.

Airplanes!!!!

The speed of the reincarnation treasure ship is very fast.

At this time, many Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors were chatting.

Ye Tian and the Lord of Ice and Rain were chatting.

Suddenly.

A terrifying tentacle leaped from the primordial one, and its aura was incomparably terrifying, and it was definitely comparable to the combat power of the top Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor.

"Get out!"

The Desolate Blood Ancestor snorted coldly.

The tentacle quickly shattered, turning into countless fragments.

"This should be a reincarnation ruin beast, right?"

An Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor muttered.

The Reincarnation Ruin Beast is a creature of the Reincarnation Ruins, all of them are very powerful, and there are even existences comparable to the Overlords of the Origin Upper Realm.

Even if it is the Desolate Blood Ancestor, he is afraid of encountering the reincarnation ruin beast of the overlord of the Origin Upper Realm, but he is not afraid, but there is no need to entangle with the other party, otherwise it will be very troublesome, in case it causes a large number of reincarnation ruin beasts, it will be bad.

Along.

One by one, the reincarnation ruin beasts attacked the reincarnation treasure ship, but they were all solved by the Desolate Blood Ancestor.

"It's almost there!"

The Desolate Blood Ancestor said.

Seeing that they had finally arrived at their destination, many Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors not only did not breathe a sigh of relief, but became even more nervous.

On the road alone, there were many dangers, and the danger of this treasure land was even greater.

Then.

Some Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors had already taken their attention and only looked for things on the periphery of the treasure land, and left when they saw that the situation was not good.

They don't want to die here!

Airplanes!!!

A twisted void treasure appeared in front of them, and from the outside, they couldn't see anything at all, and only after entering, they could see what was inside.

"Let's all go in!"

The Desolate Blood Ancestor said.

Whoa!!!

One after another, the Heavenly Ancestors of the Origin Upper Realm entered this treasure land.

Ye Tian and the Lord of Ice and Rain also entered.

After all the Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors entered, the Desolate Blood Ancestor and several Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors of the Desolate Ancient Heavenly Palace still resided here.

"Lord Desolate Blood Ancestor, they have all entered, I'm afraid they will have to die a lot this time!" said a top-notch Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor with emotion.

"yes, I'm sure I'm going to have to die a lot this time, it's dangerous here, but there's a lot of good stuff. Our Ancient Heavenly Palace sent ten top-notch Origin Ascenders into the realm, but six of them died. If you go all out to explore and put the entire Ancient Heavenly Palace into it, you won't be able to complete the exploration. Let them go in and explore, sacrifice them, and let us know about the situation of this treasure land. They can also use their hands to clean up the creatures here, it's a win-win!" the Wildblood Ancestor smiled.

"Yes, they probably still want to explore a little area on the periphery and leave, but when they really see the treasure, they will definitely not be able to control themselves, and they must want to go deeper, no Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor can resist the temptation!" said another Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor.

Subsequently.

The Desolate Blood Ancestor is cultivating here, anyway, it will take a long time for these Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors to come out!
